message:
style(harness): apply rustfmt formatting to artifact_manifest, failure_signatures, and proof_oracle

Normalize alignment and line-wrapping across three harness modules:
- artifact_manifest: collapse multi-line ShadowReport field array, expand
  long assert chains in retention_days_ordered test
- failure_signatures: realign trailing comments in required_fields, collapse
  single-expression match arms, expand multi-condition asserts into proper
  block form for readability
- proof_oracle: reflow chained iterator in relaxed_dims collection, expand
  assert macros with messages onto multiple lines per rustfmt conventions

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
